cadence_note: ELSTAT publishes on a per-publication release calendar (https://www.statistics.gr/en/calendar) rather than a single source-wide cadence: the fastest publications are monthly (e.g. DKT87 CPI, SJO02 labour force), most are quarterly or annual, and a few are decennial (SAM* census tabulations). Each publication's timeseries workbook is cumulative and rewritten in place on release, so a weekly re-pull is the cheapest cadence that never lags a monthly release by more than a week. No incremental filter exists; every refresh re-fetches the full corpus.
